SELECT ?s, bif:ST_TransScale(?o, 0, 0, 1, 1) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } ORDER BY ASC(str(?s));
SELECT ?s, bif:ST_TransScale(?o, 10, 10, 2, 2) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } ORDER BY ASC(str(?s));
SELECT ?s, bif:ST_TransScale(?o, -5, -5, 0.5, 0.5) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } ORDER BY ASC(str(?s));
SELECT ?s, bif:ST_TransScale(?o, 0.1, 0.2, 0.1, 0.1) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o FILTER(?s = <http://geo-api-demo/box1>) } ORDER BY ASC(str(?s));
SELECT ?s, bif:ST_TransScale(?o, 0, 0, 1, 1) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { SELECT ?s ?o WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } } ORDER BY ASC(str(?s));
SELECT ?s, bif:ST_TransScale(?o, 3, 3, 1, 2) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o FILTER(CONTAINS(str(?s), 'polygon')) } ORDER BY ASC(str(?s));
SELECT ?s, bif:ST_TransScale(?o, x, y, 2, 2) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { SELECT ?s ?o WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } FILTER(?o = <http://geo-api-demo/polygon1>) } ORDER BY ASC(str(?s));
SELECT ?s, bif:ST_TransScale(?o, 100, 200, 10, 20) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } ORDER BY ASC(str(?s));
